text:
I once knew a cat named Oliver. Oliver was a fluffy yellow tabby who lived to chase laser pointers. Even though he was just a fluffy bundle of fur, he captured the hearts of everyone who ever met him.

One afternoon, Oliver discovered a mysterious pink laser pointer. He chased it around the house, meowing ardently. His owners watched him from behind a chair, giggling uncontrollably. They couldn’t get their minds off the pink dot on Oliver’s nose.

After many attempts, they discovered how gentle they could be. When Oliver stopped chasing the dot, they threw it outside. Oliver pranced over eagerly to retrieve it, his bushy tail flopping behind him.

From that day forward, Oliver had an entire pink universe in his hunt. It wasn’t long before neighbors started tricking him with more pink pointers.

Oliver eventually tired of chasing them. One lovely evening, he brought home a tiny pink feather. It became his laser pointer of choice, dangling it gently
